events.connection.oauthparameters.CfnAbo: Contains the OAuth authorization parameters to use for the connection.

events.connection.oauthparameters.Author.Description: The URL to the authorization endpoint when OAuth is specified as the authorization type.

events.connection.oauthparameters.Client.Description: A `CreateConnectionOAuthClientRequestParameters` object that contains the client parameters for OAuth authorization.

events.connection.oauthparameters.HttpMe.Description: The method to use for the authorization request.

events.connection.oauthparameters.OAuthH.Description: A `ConnectionHttpParameters` object that contains details about the additional parameters to use for the connection.
